{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004114CAFF225C5A38443C881A"}"},"total":142},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615188398095188761","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"经鉴定：此书为系统之女神反转的良性互动版[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773123674,"group_id":"7603418861710347289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3HFZ+Iu6k26XKxV/xU6YQwBFngg6+ZtHwFkcmXAsvYp","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cdcc13ea03c94276800c2655de48d109~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873847&x-signature=DENkOVN5s8KHt%2Fe2FVKVLZWw9ek%3D","user_id":"4196151170435204","user_name":"喜欢松籽的元秋白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4196151170435204","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603418861710347289","book_info":{"abstract":"【有图，三十而已、流金岁月、一生一世、有风、荣耀...】
陈泽穿越到影视剧世界当中，还获得了一个‘女神任务系统’，让他可以给符合要求的女神发放系统。
女神完成任务后获得的奖励91分，而陈泽是其中的9。
于是，这个世界最大的奴隶主、黑心资本家诞生了。
多年后，得知自己辛辛苦苦完成任务后获得的奖励，自己居然只拿到了一成，女神们炸锅了。
顾佳：“陈泽，你就是这个世界上最黑心的资本家！”
许红豆：“陈泽，你不光压榨我的奖励，还让我给你生孩子？”
蒋南孙：“陈泽，分呢？‘/东叔拍桌’我的积分呢！”
乔晶晶：“呸~陈泽你臭不要脸，还我的奖励！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/84c9f642488d53b75d7764609345fb35","author":"疯狂二喵","author_id":"","book_id":"7603418861710347289","book_name":"影视：完蛋，我被女主包围了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603418999602299417","read_count":"74068","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"354594"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"159","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dcd56d57d90acc6209e56f878e0d426b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468074&x-signature=hb%2BC5j8ltaXQN4xgGBqjm4wNxpY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2093080775759591","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004114CAFF225C5A38443C881A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_coun
